productDisplayName: Puma Men Visor Multifunction Silver white Black Watches
description: This watch from puma comes in a bold design of sub dials and the cat logo on its white dial, which makes it a stylish buy. This active watch is perfect for urban wear. Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 10 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsMetal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and style Black dial with cat logo on the bottom right cornerDial with day, date and hour sub dialsPolished hands with sweep secondsApplied metal Arabic eleven, twelve and one markingQuartz movement of time display Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters
